name: Teamsters Local #238
description_short: Teamsters Local #238 Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative in Cedar Rapids, Iowa serving Teamsters union members with savings accounts, loans, and online banking.
description_long:
Teamsters Local #238 Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union located in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, operating under NCUA insurance. The organization serves members of the Teamsters union, providing financial services tailored to union workers and their families. Founded on cooperative principles, the credit union prioritizes member benefits over profit maximization.

The credit union offers a range of consumer financial products including share draft checking accounts, share savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and individual retirement accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, they provide auto loans, signature loans, motorcycle loans, and recreational vehicle loans. Members can access online banking services and use their routing number (273973210) for electronic transactions. The institution maintains a physical branch office at 5050 J Street SW in Cedar Rapids with standard business hours Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.

What distinguishes Teamsters Local #238 is its union-specific membership model and focus on serving Teamsters employees and their families. The credit union advertises competitive rates on their loan products and savings accounts, though specific APRs are not detailed on the website. Their membership eligibility is restricted to Teamsters union members, differentiating them from banks that serve the general public. The organization emphasizes security and fraud prevention through notices about phishing scams and fraudulent solicitation attempts.

For consumers seeking union-affiliated financial services in the Cedar Rapids area, this credit union provides a legitimate alternative to traditional banks with member-focused governance. However, membership eligibility restrictions limit accessibility, and the website provides minimal transparency regarding specific rates, fees, or loan terms. The credit union appears operationally sound but offers limited online visibility into their competitive positioning relative to other credit unions or banks.
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means earnings benefit members rather than shareholders
Advertises competitive rates on auto loans, signature loans, motorcycle loans, and RV loans
Offers full range of deposit products including share accounts, CDs, and IRAs
NCUA-insured member accounts provide federal insurance protection
Online banking available for account access and transactions
Specific routing number (273973210) published for electronic transfers
Focused on serving Teamsters union members with union-affiliated financial services
cons: Membership restricted to Teamsters union members only—not accessible to general public
Website lacks specific information on APRs, fees, or rate comparisons versus competitors
Limited branch access (single Cedar Rapids location) may inconvenience members outside the area
Minimal online functionality showcased; no indication of mobile app availability
Few details on loan terms, approval requirements, or application timelines
best_for: Teamsters union members in or near Cedar Rapids, Iowa seeking checking and savings accounts
Union workers looking to finance vehicle purchases with member-focused lending
Teamsters employees interested in retirement savings through union-affiliated institution
diagnosis: Teamsters Local #238 Credit Union is best for active and retired Teamsters union members in the Cedar Rapids area seeking competitive loan rates and member-owned banking services. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted to Teamsters union members, making this institution inaccessible to non-union consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Teamsters Local #238 — NCUA-insured credit union in Cedar Rapids, IA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
